contract_scope: Envelope returned by GET /api/node/profile and published on Semantic-DNS as service type king.inference.v1.
honesty_rules: vram_total_bytes and vram_free_bytes MUST be 0 when gpu.present is false or the platform probe cannot read the value. Probe output is never fabricated or extrapolated.
cpu.physical_count MAY equal cpu.logical_count when the platform does not expose a physical core count distinct from logical; probe code MUST NOT guess a ratio.
gpu.kind is set to the detected family; unknown/unreadable hardware maps to 'other' only when a GPU was detected but not classified. 'none' means no GPU detected.
memory.available_bytes falls back to total_bytes when the probe does not distinguish available from total; this is explicit, not a silent default.
Every field is observed on each call; there is no lazy caching that could let an earlier boot's numbers leak into a later call on the same process.

loadable_models.note: filled by M-5 registry; empty array until then
